demo.title: skopos.sh
demo.code:
# Ask anything crypto — one endpoint, no key, no signup
curl -s -X POST https://www.tryskopos.xyz/api/chat \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"message":"who is buying $doge","anonId":"demo-1","format":"text"}'

# Autonomous agents pay per call over x402 (USDC on Base)
# price $0.01 · risk $0.02 · smart-money $0.05 · sniper-check $0.25
# flash-order $0.02 — limit / stop-loss / take-profit / TWAP quotes
curl -s https://www.tryskopos.xyz/llms.txt

setup: Nothing to install — the free chat endpoint works immediately, no key
Agents: discover the pay-per-call x402 endpoints at https://www.tryskopos.xyz/openapi.json
